summary: Full E2E testing of ScholarHub completed. 26/26 backend pytest tests passed (auth, AI generate for all 4 content types via Claude Sonnet 4.5, AI chat, focus lifecycle, progress upsert/list, stats, auth-gate on protected endpoints). All major frontend flows pass: landing, register->dashboard, login->dashboard, dashboard stats+grade selector, subjects browser (5 subjects), subject detail (topics), topic tabs + AI summary generation, focus mode 1-min session with full-screen overlay+countdown, logout via sidebar.

minor.issue: CORS configured with allow_credentials=True and allow_origins defaulting to '*'. Starlette will refuse to return wildcard for credentialed requests; for Google OAuth httpOnly cookie flow to work cross-origin, set CORS_ORIGINS env to explicit origin(s).
Response shape inconsistent: returns {'active': null} OR {'active': sess, 'last': sess}. Consider always returning both keys for frontend simplicity.

issues: Console shows two 401 errors on every page load (from /api/auth/me probe with no token). Functionally harmless but adds console noise. Consider skipping the probe when no token in localStorage.

action_items: (Optional) Lock CORS_ORIGINS to explicit frontend origin in backend/.env before enabling Google OAuth in production.
(Optional) Suppress /api/auth/me 401 console noise on public pages.
(Optional) server.py is 572 lines; consider splitting into routers (auth, ai, focus, progress) when it grows further.
critical_code_review_comments: All MongoDB reads correctly project out _id and password_hash — good.
AI generate uses robust extract_json that strips code fences — sensible defensive parsing.
Focus auto-completes past-end sessions on /focus/active read — good UX.
Bearer JWT auth resolver also accepts session_token cookie (Google) — clean dual-auth.
duration_minutes in /focus/start has no upper bound or non-negative validation; could allow 0 or huge values. Recommend Pydantic Field(ge=1, le=240).
test_credentials: Email: TEST_student_<uuid>@scholarhub.app / StudyHard2026! created dynamically per pytest run. UI probe user: ui_test_<uuid>@scholarhub.app / StudyHard2026!.
seed_data_creation: Each test run creates a unique TEST_ prefixed user via /api/auth/register. Progress topics prefixed TEST_Algebra. Focus session task prefixed 'TEST'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_scholarhub_backend.py and can be re-run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. AI tests take ~80s (real Claude calls). Subject IDs: mathematics, english, science, history, pe (note 'pe' not 'physical-education'). Topic id for math: arithmetic/algebra/geometry/statistics.
rca of the issue: No bugs to RCA. All listed feature/test items in the review request pass.
